category_title: Students identified as 'struggling' who provide character analysis and visualization
scenario_title: Whole-group discussion of a challenging text with interceding talk
minimal_context: The tutor is asking the student to share his visual image of 'Cathy, Queen of Cats' with the whole group after a partner discussion.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Now that we've finished our partner talk, let's interpret these few lines of 'Cathy, Queen of Cats' together with the whole group. Camilo, what visual image did you get?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: She’s telling the kids how the street is.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Can you explain that to the class?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Lets other students jump into the conversation to avoid getting caught not knowing) I don't know.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Now that we've finished our partner talk, let's interpret these few lines of 'Cathy, Queen of Cats' together with the whole group. Camilo, what visual image did you get?

STUDENT: The cat lady.

TUTOR: Okay. What else?

STUDENT: She’s telling the kids how the street is.

TUTOR: Can you explain that to the class?

STUDENT: (Lets other students jump into the conversation to avoid getting caught not knowing) I don't know.

task.content: Interpreting a few lines at a time of 'Cathy, Queen of Cats' and providing a visual image
task.learning_goal: Interpreting this story and providing analysis of the story

context.environment: General education classroom during whole-group literacy discussion
context.materials: Selection titled 'Cathy, Queen of Cats' from House on Mango Street (Cisneros, 1991)
context.social_setting: Partner discussion followed by whole-group discussion with tumult and turn sharks

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: In real classrooms when doing school tasks and facing turn sharks ready to jump into the conversation
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Spend their time avoiding getting caught not knowing and arranging to not look incompetent

behavior_patterns.condition: When asked for a visual image during interpretation of a challenging story
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Provides brief analysis that can easily be lost across 43 lines of interceding talk
related_quotes: She’s telling the kids how the street is.

behavior_patterns.condition: When taking the general education version of the test based on previous performance on HST
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Requires taking the test in a small group, outside the general education classroom, so that portions of the test could be read aloud
